title: StudioDash Guides
description: Official StudioDash guides covering every aspect of the platform, from getting started and integrations to analytics, reporting, security, and future development.

pages.title: Overview
pages.description: Discover StudioDash and see how it helps developers manage apps, revenue, websites, and connected services.

pages.title: Features
pages.description: Explore the tools that make StudioDash your central developer workspace.

pages.title: Integrations
pages.description: Learn which developer services StudioDash connects to and how they work together.

pages.title: Dashboard
pages.description: See how StudioDash brings your apps, revenue, websites, and providers together in one dashboard.

pages.title: Revenue Analytics
pages.description: Track App Store, advertising, and website revenue from one place.

pages.title: App Store Analytics
pages.description: Monitor app performance, downloads, ratings, reviews, and release status through App Store Connect.

pages.title: Website & SEO Analytics
pages.description: Review website traffic, search visibility, and SEO performance with Cloudflare and Google Search Console.

pages.title: Reporting
pages.description: Learn how StudioDash helps you review trends, compare time periods, and understand your data.

pages.title: Automation & Sync
pages.description: Understand synchronisation, provider health, cached data, and future automation features.

pages.title: Security & Privacy
pages.description: Learn how StudioDash protects your credentials, connected services, and developer data.

pages.title: FAQ
pages.description: Find answers to the most common questions about StudioDash, its features, and private beta.

pages.title: Release Notes
pages.description: Follow StudioDash development milestones, feature updates, and release progress.

pages.title: Private Beta
pages.description: Learn how the StudioDash private beta works and how developers can get involved.

pages.title: Complete Guide
pages.description: Everything you need to know about StudioDash in one comprehensive guide.

pages.title: Screenshots
pages.description: Take a visual tour of StudioDash and discover the key features of every screen.
